generated_oml:
// ===== Physical Sensing Components =====
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor shaft of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearwheel gearbox of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor phase current sensor I_M measuring the drive current of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// ===== Data Transmitted (live MQTT streams) =====
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// ===== Stored Measurement Data (DataPoints in the Digital Shadow) =====
instance MeasuredMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor shaft angle r_M measured by the motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance MeasuredGearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox output angle r_G measured by the secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of phase current I_M measured by the motor current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

// ===== Engineering & Simulation Models =====
instance SysMLAxisStructureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component & connector diagram of the first axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASRepository
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel gearbox (without friction)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkCycloidalGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox (without friction)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous friction for the axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkStribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing the Stribeck friction characteristic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkDahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Dahl friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkLuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing the LuGre friction formulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

// ===== Simulated Output Data (produced by Simulink Engine) =====
instance SimulatedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkCoulombViscousFrictionModel,
    SimulinkStribeckFrictionModel,
    SimulinkDahlFrictionModel,
    SimulinkLuGreFrictionModel
]

instance SimulatedMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor angle ^r_M generated by the friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulatedGearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox angle ^r_G generated by the friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulatedOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output angle ^r_out (including torque and angular velocity arrays)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

// ===== Enablers (tools & platforms) =====
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker handling live one‑way data flow from robot to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterIdentificationService, DataAggregationService
]

instance SimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment running the friction and drivetrain models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterIdentificationService, SimulationResultVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardApp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard visualizing measured versus simulated data for engineers"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance AASRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell repository storing metadata and linking DataPoints to the SysML asset model"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService
]

// ===== Services =====
instance FrictionParameterIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters from live data"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightFrictionParametersDerived, ActionUpdateRobotControlAlgorithm
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of measured vs. simulated angle, torque and velocity traces"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightMeasuredVsSimulatedDeviation, ActionNotifyEngineer
]

instance SimulationResultVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Presentation of simulation results within the dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightSimulationResultsAvailable
]

instance DataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregation and historical storage of all measured and simulated data for further analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightDataSetComplete
]

instance ControlAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model‑based improvement of robot motion accuracy using identified friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightControlAccuracyImproved
]

// ===== Insights =====
instance InsightFrictionParametersDerived : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) indicating the current friction state of the first axis"
]

instance InsightMeasuredVsSimulatedDeviation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected deviation between measured and simulated angles/torques highlighting model mismatches"
]

instance InsightSimulationResultsAvailable : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation outputs are ready for inspection on the dashboard"
]

instance InsightDataSetComplete : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "All relevant data traces have been aggregated and stored in the digital shadow"
]

instance InsightControlAccuracyImproved : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Robot control algorithm receives updated friction parameters, improving motion accuracy"
]

// ===== Actions =====
instance ActionUpdateRobotControlAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feed the newly identified friction parameters back to the robot control algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActionNotifyEngineer : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Notify an engineer through the dashboard about significant measured‑vs‑simulated deviations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None – the digital shadow is a passive (one‑way) representation and does not send commands back to the robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time synchronization with the sensor stream (online update of data traces as new measurements arrive)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow constellation composed of the FrictionShadow instance, purpose class FrictionDerivation, asset class Mabi, processing components (Simulation_M, Simulation_GW, Simulation_GB) that consume input traces and produce simulated traces, all linked through the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operative stage – the digital shadow is created and used during runtime to monitor and improve the robot’s motion control; design and manufacturing stages are not represented."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each data point to its source and processing component; continuous validation by comparing simulated friction‑compensated output with measured reference data; use of both white‑box (analytical) and black‑box (data‑driven) models to capture model uncertainty."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data from the robot is transmitted to the digital shadow over MQTT; the connection is unidirectional and ties each data trace to its originating sensor channel."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses the Industry 4.0 Asset Administration Shell (AAS) specification for metadata and conforms to SysML modeling standards; simulation models follow MATLAB/Simulink conventions."
]
